use_cases: Rotating animated headlines in hero sections with typewriter effect
Displaying cycling taglines or feature descriptions in marketing pages
Animated text reveal for loading or transitional states
Cycling through product highlights or value propositions
Interactive text animations that trigger on scroll into view
ai_summary: A typewriter-style animated text component that cycles through an array of strings, typing out each character sequentially with a blinking cursor. The animation triggers on scroll into view using Framer Motion's useInView hook, with configurable typing speed, rotation interval, and text array. Features a minimalist flat design with a pulsing cursor indicator, commonly used in hero sections and marketing pages to create engaging animated headings.
